TextENGNew: ``All right, here's to our victory... Cheers!!``
We all held up our full beer glasses and sang out following Maeno-san's lead.
The contents spilled out a bit, but none of us were particularly concerned.

``Nn, ngh... Haah...!@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2223. Man~, a cold beer in this cold season is pretty nice!@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2224. With this tension in the back of my neck... it neutralizes the hot air coming from the pot, so I can drink as many cups as I'd like!``
``Still, don't drink too much, all right?@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2280. I'm drinking too, so I can't drive you home today.``

``I know, I know. Man, you're persistent...@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2226. I won't drink that much today.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2227. ...Heey, hostess, three more orders of hot sake!@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2228. Bring me something that'll make my heart feel like it's on fire!``
``Just because you're drinking sake doesn't mean we need to drink it together!``
``Hahaha, the two of you make a nice pair...``
The man sitting across from us... Chief Souma of NRIPS curiously watched our interactions while opening another beer bottle.
When I noticed that, I quickly took the bottle and said ``here you go`` while filling his glass.
``Ah, thanks, you're so considerate.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2011. ...Now Maeno-san, you shouldn't bully a younger woman, you know?``

``And to make it worse, you have a reputation of being extremely strict with your subordinates and colleagues.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2013. You should lighten up on her. You'll end up in another HR inquiry meeting.``
``How rude, I'm not bullying!@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2230. In fact, I treat Minai the way a parent would treat their child. Gently, patiently, and sincerely...``
``...You're still single, aren't you?``
``Hehe... well, the parent/child analogy does hold true.@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2283. But it's closer to a lion's parent/child relationship.``
``Knocking your cubs to the bottom of a ravine for the sake of their training?@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2016. That's great! What a perfect mental image!@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2017. Aahahahaha!!``
``Ohhh, Minai!@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2232. Are you saying it's fair for me to actually kick you to the bottom of a valley?!``
Maeno-san cut in with a half-teasing, half-serious look on his face.
Just a little while ago, I was frightened when he stared at me like this... but now, I had built up enough of a tolerance I could even laugh through it.

Plus, Maeno-san was tough when it arrived at work and he would give a stern scolding any time I overlooked something, but if you keep calm and think through all his points, every single one of them is conscientious and accurate.
His strict reproach and warnings were his way of expressing his high expectations in others.
After I understood that, I disregarded the concerns from other people at the Public Relations Office and started being proactive.
So, even if the parent/child relationship is slightly overstating it, it is more like a brother/sister relationship between siblings of a large age gap.
...Is it selfish of me to see it that way?
(However, just for tonight...)
I wished to go back to the old times, just a little, so I intentionally pretended to be ill-tempered.
Seeming to realize that, Maeno-san had a slight wry smile on his face and leaned his face closer to look at me from below.
``...What's that, Minai?@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2234. Are you still angry?``
``No... I'm not particularly upset.@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2286. Just a little hurt about being deceived.``
``Deceived? Why, I'm hurt.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2236. Did I ever lie to you?``

``You may not have lied to me... but you did abstain from telling me the truth, didn't you?@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2288. Maeno-san, you and Souma-san were already acquainted? ...Yet today was the first I'd heard of it?``
``And not just that, but you attended the same college at the same time, and had a senior/junior relationship with one another... You're practically family!``
``Huh? Didn't I tell you that before?@k@|@y@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2238. ...Sorry, I must've forgotten.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2239. Ahahahaha.``
...What a bald-faced lie.
He must have intentionally kept silent because he wished to tease me and make me think I had enemies on all sides when I desperately pleaded with NRIPS to win their cooperation.
...Looking back on it now, Souma-san always spoke up at just the right time during the presentation, trying to set up the atmosphere in the room to give us an advantage.
In other words, I was completely taken in by Maeno-san's plan... I was writhing in agony even though our victory was practically assured from the start...
``...You know how miserable I felt during that presentation?``

``Making me explain the necessity of profiling analysis to people older than me... top-brass people far more skilled and knowledgeable than me... and asking for their help? I felt like I was teaching fish to swim!``
``Do you have any idea how embarrassing it is to know you were carrying on with that sly attitude...?``

``Yes... it certainly was a sight to behold.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2019. Once you were interrogated on the finer details of profiling analysis, you were clearly trying to hide your agitation while squeezing out the answers.``
``To be honest, it was hard to keep myself from laughing.``
``You too, Souma-san? ...You're terrible!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2294. I figured you knew more than everyone else... but even you were making fun of me at the time?``
``Souma-san, every time you and the others pointed something out, I seriously felt terrible about my insufficient study...``
``Well, it's true that we may have gotten a little carried away.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2241. ...But on the other hand, things went well.``
As he uttered those words, Maeno-san collected the hot sake that the waitress had just brought, then handed a glass to Souma-san and another to me, with a cheerful smile on his face.
Then he filled each glass one by one, before turning to me with a broad grin.
``...NRIPS has been following profiling analysis techniques for several years now.``
``Souma has even spoken to me about it several times in the past... I really do expect a revolutionary advancement in investigation progress if it can become well established.``
``And a paper Honjou-san of Ibaraki prefectural police submitted at a meeting drummed up enough interest to get things started.``
...But even though they reached the consensus that it would be necessary to test it in the field, they never put it into practice.
Since NRIPS doesn't have the authority to put together an organization to handle the proposal.
Thus, there was no framework for establishing who was in charge in the field and who was responsible.
Plus... the connection between NRIPS and field investigators was worse than nonexistent, it was negative.
Thanks to that, both sides resented one another for getting in the way of their work, or stealing the credit for their accomplishments, so it would be impossible to clear up those doubts.
``That's why we all cheered when we heard the person who came up with the means to put it into practice wasn't some desk jockey, but a detective with prior field experience.``
``No matter how exhaustingly we explain the theories behind it, the wall between us and the field couldn't be broken so easily.``

``But Chief Inspector Minai,@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2024. not only do you have reach with the upper echelons of the NPA, but you're also close to the field detectives. So they'd probably be willing to listen to you, and you can act as the bridge between.``

``The tie-in with the TV stations was also a necessary motivator for NRIPS, who had shot themselves in the foot with their obsession with secrecy and reliability.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2026. ...So, we bet on this possibility.``
``...Souma-san.``
``And you've more than met those expectations.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2028. ...Thank you, Chief Inspector Minai.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2029. And let me thank you on behalf of my colleagues as well.``
Souma-san gave me a gentle look as he raised his glass in hand.

When I first met him, he seemed stiff, prideful, and hard to reach... but he did not alter his behavior at all just because I was younger or female, so I was honestly impressed by his sincere attitude.
``Well, ever since they read the material you prepared for this proposal, the director of NRIPS and the general manager were already going to agree to it.``
``Of course, that was largely due to Honjou-san's name being attached, and the Commissioner's influence making a big deal out of it.``
``And Souma negotiated in advance to have speaking power with someone on the chief level out in the field.``
``...In fact, we had such a strong tailwind behind us I might be uncomfortable calling it a fair race.``

``...I'm honored.@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2298. But I'm also sorry for having come to rely on all the kindness you provided.@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2299. In the end, I couldn't do anything... I was just riding on the compassion of others...``
``...No need to be so humble, Minai.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2250. We didn't choose to support you because we thought you needed it.``
``We helped you without any hesitation, because we fully expected you to be capable of carrying out our will.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2252. And for that, you should be proud.``

``Responsibility and conviction are certainly important things to have.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2254. And you can only get through to others by demonstrating that you're capable of making the necessary effort.``
``...But that doesn't mean you need to carry the burden all on your own.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2256. Leave others to handle their area of expertise, and just do the best you can.``
``It's wrong to depend on others from the start, but never forget that there's only so much you can do entirely on your own.``
``Maeno-san...``

``And please don't misunderstand.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2031. Don't think that we're being swayed by you... We're actually acting of our own accord.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2032. This is for the sake of making a change we always dreamed of a reality.``
``So don't feel inferior. Be proud.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2034. And continue living up to our expectations.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2035. That is the very best thing you can do to contribute.``
``...@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2303.Thank you.``
Maeno-san, Souma-san.
...Your words are so warm.
I have been doing my utmost to persuade the researchers at NRIPS... That is why I eschewed sleep to desperately work on compiling these materials.
If I failed... I would be betraying the kindness and support that Maeno-san, the Commissioner, the director, and everyone had shown to me. So I continued to feel the heavy responsibility of that.
But... the truth is, these great people around me are doing this exhausting work for their sake as well.
Thank you.
And, I am sorry.
What a stunted, arrogant way of thinking. Believing I had to do something so huge all on my own...
``...Although, Chief Inspector Minai,@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2259. from now on things are going to get even more difficult.``
``You'll need to talk to investigators in the field and the people in charge of them, convincing them to support your project.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2261. ...I think that'll be far harder than this.``

``The on-site investigators have their hands full with plenty of case work, so needless to say, they'll be hesitant to agree to any unfamiliar requests and demands.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2263. Getting through to them isn't as easy as you might think.``
``...I'll take that to heart.@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2305. I won't go easy. I'll hit them with everything I've got, and persuade them.``
For a moment, I thought to myself ``...I already know that,`` but I was not about to say that.
Since answering that way would be making light of Maeno-san's thoughtful advice.
``Hmm?@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2265. Ohh, it's here... I've been waiting~!``
Just then, the waitress walked in with the hot pot ingredients, as if she could read the atmosphere of the room.
Maeno-san cheered as he grabbed it, and then tossed it into the pot without any hesitation.
(Pufferfish hot pot, huh...?)
This was actually my first time eating pufferfish.
I am a little worried about getting poisoned... but if I said anything about it, Maeno-san and Souma-san would seriously laugh at me.

``...Honestly, I really wanted to play a hands-on role.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2037. But unfortunately, there are greatly of requests for forensic investigations nowadays... so it's somewhat impossible for me.``
changeReason: New introduces grammatical error 'greatly of requests' (should be 'a lot of requests'); while the intended meaning is unchanged, the error itself is notable.

TextENGNew: ``So, I guess the only thing I can help you with going forward is preliminary arrangements.``
``Well, it's inevitable that the work piles up for the capable.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2267. ...So, who will be in charge of things then?``
``The person most suitable for the task is probably... Chief Oouchi?@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2040. Although, it seems personnel affairs is giving it some consideration.``
``Hmm... Oouchi, huh?@k@vS20/00/VTK2_maeno2269. He does at least have greatly of experience in many fields... but it concerns me how overconfident he is in himself.``
changeReason: New introduces grammatical error 'greatly of experience' (should be 'a lot of experience'); while the intended meaning is unchanged, the error itself is notable.

TextENGNew: ``Well... I can't say it'll be all right.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2042. But as long as he's not actively dealing with the investigators in the field, there probably won't be any problems.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2043. I'm expecting Chief Inspector Minai to play an active role as the coordinator on that front.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_souma2044. Plus...``
While half-listening to the conversation between the two of them, I opened the lid on the pot and gazed at it while feeling distant.
Until a few months ago, I thought there was nobody as unlucky as me... but the truth is, I have had an incredible series of good luck.
Maeno-san.
Souma-san.
The Commissioner's Secretariat, the director of NRIPS, and Honjou-san...
I was blessed with countless excellent and influential supporters, it was scary. My hand trembled as I held the ladle.
Looking at the current situation, yes... it was like being passed a set of dice and rolling a six over and over.
On the other hand, I am wondering what unexpected pitfalls are awaiting beyond this good fortune.
...That small anxiety floated to mind, stabbing at my thoughts.
But... I have no time for fear or hesitation.
I need to move forward.
I have decided I'll press onward.
``Nagisa-san...@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2309. There are still so many things I need to accomplish, but I think I can do it.@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2310. ...So, please wait a little longer.``
